mapper.select:
/* courtLcMgmtMapper.getCourtLcMgmtDtlList */
SELECT LC_DTL_SEQ, SUBSTR(MOBILE_NO, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(MOBILE_NO, 4, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(MOBILE_NO, 8, 4) AS MOBILE_NO, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(OPEN_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS OPEN_DT, UNPD_PRC, INST_PRC, SUM_PRC, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = DTL.REGST_ID) AS REGST_ID, TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGST_DTTM, (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = DTL.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_ID, TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RVISN_DTTM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(OPEN_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AS OPEN_DATE FROM MSP_LC_DTL DTL WHERE LC_SEQ = #{lcMstSeq} ORDER BY LC_DTL_SEQ
mapper.update: /* CourtLcMgmtMapper.updateLcDtl */ UPDATE MSP_LC_DTL SET MOBILE_NO = #{contactNum}, OPEN_DT = #{openDt}, UNPD_PRC = #{unpdPrc}, INST_PRC = #{instPrc}, SUM_PRC = #{totalPrc}, RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId}, RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE LC_DTL_SEQ = #{lcDtlSeq}
mapper.select: /* CourtLcMgmtMapper.chkNewYear */ SELECT COUNT(ISSUE_DTTM) AS CHK_NEW_YEAR FROM MSP_LC_MST WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(ISSUE_DTTM, 'YYYY')
